# CAPP-0008 Stable Entry Disposition

> Status: accepted and implemented - Date: 2026-07-07

CAPP-0008 is accepted as the CAP-Digest stable-entry gate set. The gate
evidence is recorded in the v1.0 documents under `specs/digest/`, the fixture
suite under `fixtures/`, the Python reference scripts under `reference/python/`,
and the release packages under `release-artifacts/`.

No CAP-Core v1.0.0 evidence is used as CAP-Digest stable evidence. CAP-Core
remains a separate layer.
